docs.title: automotive-test-kit
docs.text: automotive-test-kit is a monorepo that includes various automotive test automation packages. It is designed to streamline and centralize automotive testing, automation, and documentation.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Aggregates multiple automotive test automation packages.
  • Provides a unified interface for various tools and utilities.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
To run the main entry point:

python -m src.automotive_test_kit.main

This will print:

Hello from automotive-test-kit!
